title: English Teacher
description:
Location: North-East Region

Job Responsibilities

Teaching & Learning

  • Conduct engaging and interactive English lessons for preschool and primary-level students based on Centre curriculum.
  • Deliver lessons that build students’ speaking, reading, and writing confidence while cultivating love for the English language.
  • Prepare lesson materials, teaching aids, and assessments; maintain accurate student progress records.
  • Differentiate teaching according to student ability and learning style.
  • Participate in curriculum development, internal training, and academic research to improve teaching quality.

Student & Parent Engagement

  • Provide constructive feedback and regular progress updates to parents.
  • Support centre events such as trial classes, performances, and open houses.
  • Create a positive and inspiring classroom atmosphere that motivates students to express themselves confidently.

Team Collaboration

  • Work closely with other teachers and the Centre Management to maintain consistency and quality in teaching delivery.
  • Contribute ideas to curriculum enhancement, activity planning, and internal meetings.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in English Language, Education, Linguistics, or related field.
  • At least 5+ years of relevant teaching experience (teaching English subject) in Singapore MOE school settings.
  • Track record in developing English teaching materials based on MOE syllabus.
  • Familiar with Singapore MOE English syllabus and PSLE exam requirements.
  • Passionate about teaching and enjoys working with children.
  • Energetic, patient, and responsible; able to manage class dynamics confidently.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, PowerPoint, Excel).

Interested candidates can forward their CVs in MS Word format to yinyin@triton-ai.com

TRITON AI (EA License Number 21C0661) is a Singaporean-owned talent resource organization formed with the purpose of developing a Singaporean core for our clients.


Established since 2011 and formally operating as Talent Touche Pte Ltd, TRITON AI has undergone a total rebranding exercise in 2021 in alignment with our mission to enhance the effectiveness of Talent Acquisition and People-Powered Projects with Technology and Artificial Intelligence.
